title: Dynamic Trims Mod
description: Armor trims emit dynamic light based on their material, with fully configurable brightness via Mod Menu.
body:
# Dynamic Trims

Armor trims emit dynamic light based on their material, with fully configurable brightness via Mod Menu.

## 📖 What's this mod?

Ever wanted your glowing amethyst trim to actually **glow**? Now it does.

Dynamic Trims adds per-material dynamic lighting to armor trims, powered by LambDynamicLights. Each trim material emits its own level of light amethyst shines bright, netherite gives off a subtle glow, and everything in between is fully adjustable to your taste.

## ✅ Features

* Armor trims emit dynamic light based on their material.
* Works on players and armor stands.
* Fully configurable brightness per material (0-15) via in-game config screen.
* Lightweight, no unnecessary overhead.

## 🎨 Trim Light Levels (recommended)

| Material  | Default brightness |
|-----------|--------------------|
| Amethyst  | 12                 |
| Diamond   | 11                 |
| Quartz    | 11                 |
| Redstone  | 10                 |
| Emerald   | 8                  |
| Iron      | 9                  |
| Gold      | 7                  |
| Lapis     | 7                  |
| Copper    | 6                  |
| Netherite | 6                  |

> **Tip:** Want maximum brightness? You can push any material up to 15 in the config screen.

## ❓ Usage

Install in your mods folder along with [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights), [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) and [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu).

Open the config screen via Mod Menu to adjust brightness per material.

## 🔥 Requirements

* [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)
* [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
* [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
* [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) *(optional, for config screen)*
